title: Complete Product Entity Implementation with Full-Stack CRUD
description: Implement full-stack Product entity support following the established architectural pattern from Name and TaxRate entities. This includes creating the Product repository with specialized query methods, Product controller with validation, registering in TableRegistry, exposing via API routes, and building React UI components for product list and detail views. The canonical ontology already exists in `/generated/moneyworks-products-canonical-ontology.ts`.
why: Enable developers to build production-ready business applications by providing complete CRUD operations for Products, following proven architectural patterns. Products are central to inventory management, pricing, and sales operations in MoneyWorks. Without Product entity support, the SDK cannot enable real-world e-commerce, inventory, or sales applications.

tasks.title: Create Product TypeScript Type Definitions
tasks.description: Create packages/canonical/src/entities/products/types.ts with MoneyWorksProduct, MoneyWorksProductCreateInput, MoneyWorksProductUpdateInput, and MoneyWorksProductFilter interfaces. Use branded types (AccountCode) for COGAcct, SalesAcct, StockAcct fields. Reference existing ontology at /generated/moneyworks-products-canonical-ontology.ts for field definitions.

tasks.title: Create ProductRepository with Base CRUD
tasks.description: Create packages/data/src/repositories/product.repository.ts extending BaseMoneyWorksRepository. Implement tableName='Product', primaryKey='Code', postProcess() method to parse MW data (flags, hash, numeric fields) and add branded types, prepare() method to convert typed data to MW format. Follow exact pattern from name.repository.ts and tax-rate.repository.ts.

tasks.title: Implement Specialized ProductRepository Query Methods
tasks.description: Add 6 specialized query methods to ProductRepository: findByCode (find by product code), findByType (filter by P/R/T/S/O), findInventoried (Hash & 0x0008), findBySupplier (filter by Supplier field), searchByCategory (search Category1-4), findLowStock (StockOnHand < ReorderLevel). Each method should leverage MW search expressions where possible, fall back to JS filtering when needed.

tasks.title: Add JSDoc Documentation to ProductRepository
tasks.description: Add comprehensive JSDoc comments to all public methods in ProductRepository following project standards: clear description, @param tags, @returns description, @example for complex methods, @ai-instruction for AI guidance. Reference name.repository.ts and tax-rate.repository.ts for documentation style.

tasks.title: Export ProductRepository from Data Package
tasks.description: Add ProductRepository export to packages/data/src/repositories/index.ts to make it available for import by other packages. Follow existing export pattern.

tasks.title: Create ProductController
tasks.description: Create packages/api/src/controllers/product.ts extending BaseTableController with tableName='Product', displayName='Products', description='Products, inventory, and pricing in MoneyWorks', getPrimaryKey() returns 'Code'. Follow exact pattern from name.ts and tax-rate.ts controllers.

tasks.title: Register ProductController in TableRegistry (CRITICAL)
tasks.description: CRITICAL TASK: Register ProductController in packages/api/src/registry/table-registry.ts by importing controller, adding this.register(new ProductController(this.client)) to registerTables() method, removing 'Product' from 'upcoming' array if present. This is mandatory for Product to become 'available' per Weave painpoint Q:painpoint-table-registry.

tasks.title: Create Product List React Route
tasks.description: Create packages/web1/app/routes/products.tsx with server-side loader fetching products via smartExport, search/filter controls (search by code/description, filter by type), pagination (page, limit), table display showing Code, Description, Type, SellPrice, StockOnHand, click navigation to detail view. Follow pattern from tax-rates.tsx.

tasks.title: Create Product Detail React Route
tasks.description: Create packages/web1/app/routes/products.$code.tsx with server-side loader fetching specific product by code, edit form for key fields (Code, Description, Type, BuyPrice, SellPrice, StockOnHand, COGAcct, SalesAcct, StockAcct), Save/Delete actions, back to list navigation. Follow pattern from tax-rates.$code.tsx.

tasks.title: Register Product Routes in Routes Config
tasks.description: Add route('products', 'routes/products.tsx') and route('products/:code', 'routes/products.$code.tsx') to packages/web1/app/routes.ts following existing route registration pattern.

tasks.title: Add Products Link to Navigation
tasks.description: Add Products navigation link to main navigation menu pointing to /products route. Use Package or Box icon from lucide-react. Find Navigation component and add link following existing pattern.

tasks.title: Verify TypeScript Compilation
tasks.description: Run 'bun run typecheck' from repository root and verify zero type errors in canonical, data, api, and web1 packages. Fix any type errors found. Collect compiler output as evidence for AC-011.

tasks.title: Test API Endpoints
tasks.description: Start API server and test: GET /api/v1/tables (verify Product in 'available' array), GET /api/v1/tables/Product (verify metadata), GET /api/v1/tables/Product/export (verify products returned if data exists), GET /api/v1/tables/Product/{code} (verify specific product retrieval). Collect curl/fetch responses as evidence for AC-012.

tasks.title: Test Web UI Functionality
tasks.description: Start web server and test: navigate to /products (verify list displays), use search/filter controls, click product to navigate to /products/{code}, verify detail view shows key fields, test edit form if permissions allow. Collect screenshots or browser testing notes as evidence for AC-013.
tasks.deferredReason: User requested to defer all Web UI work and focus on API only

decisions.title: Defer Web UI Testing
decisions.description: User explicitly requested to defer all web UI work and focus on API only
decisions.rationale: API functionality is the priority; Web UI can be tested separately
decisions.alternatives: Could have tested Web UI in same session

decisions.title: Fix API Filter Error Response (Boy Scout Rule)
decisions.description: Fixed pre-existing issue where invalid MoneyWorks filter queries returned [object Object] instead of proper JSON error response
decisions.rationale: Boy scout rule - leave code better than you found it. Added try/catch in tables route with helpful error message including hint about MoneyWorks query syntax

learnings.description: MoneyWorks TSV field order differs from XML field order - PRODUCT_TSV_FIELD_MAPPING with 75 fields was required for correct field parsing
MoneyWorks Product type field uses character codes ('P'=Stock, 'S'=Service, 'A'=Assembly) not numeric values
Elysia error handler plugin doesn't catch errors from child route instances - need explicit try/catch in route handlers
MoneyWorks uses function-based query syntax (left(Code,2)="BA") not SQL-like CONTAINS operator
